CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-03-2008 Off Calendar

Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Off Calendar May-13-2008 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This cause came on regularly as scheduled this day for Default Prove-Up Hearing.
Dept. 218, Judge Ollie Marie-Victoire, Clerk: Kevin Dougherty, CSR: Leticia Perez, CSR #7782.

David B. Nemer, Jr. appeared with plaintiff Donald P. Copeland, who was placed under oath and examined.
No appearance by defendants Lisa L. Williams, Calvin Tran, Fred Crump, Cedric Horne, Michelle Horne or Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc.
Defaults entered against defendants on January 18, 2008.
Doe defendants dismissed today, May 13, 2008.
Dismissal without prejudice entered as to defendant Citibank, Federal Samings Bank on October 19, 2007.
Dismissal without prejudice entered as to defendant San Francisco District Attorney, Family Support Bureau on November 5, 2007.
Dismissal without prejudice entered as to defendant Martha F. Copeland on January 16, 2008.

After hearing the evidence presented, and good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Donald P. Copeland, and against the Defaulted Defendants Lisa L. Williams, Calvin Tran, Fred Crump, Cedric Horne, Michelle Horne and Mortgage Electronic Registration Systems, Inc. as follows:

Damages/Principal - $77,525.07.
Prejudgment Interest - $2,899.22, for a total of $80,424.29.

Additionally, plaintiff is entitled to restitution and possession of the real property located at 2520-2522 Sutter Street, San Francisco, CA 94115.

Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.
